channel.title: Engineering on Apoorva Sharma
channel.description: Recent content in Engineering on Apoorva Sharma

item.title: A Note-Taking System That Actually Works for Engineers
item.description: Most note-taking systems fail because they optimise for capture, not retrieval. Here is what I do instead.

item.title: How I Learn a New Codebase
item.description: A repeatable process for getting up to speed on unfamiliar code quickly.
